{{Quote|The Confederacy's forces will expect ''some'' sort of defense at Kamino, given its strategic importance. Which is why we brought ''you'' here from your commands.|Obi-Wan Kenobi, addressing the Givin and a number of other Jedi|<ref name="Republic 50" />}}
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], a '''Givin Jedi''' was an active [[Jedi/Legends|member]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. In the early [[Standard month/Legends|months]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] was sent to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] to help defend the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] Grand [[Army/Legends|Army's]] developing [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] from an impending invasion by the [[Confederacy military/Legends|forces]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Prior to the Confederacy's [[First Battle of Kamino|assault]], the Givin and other Jedi listened to a mission briefing given by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and the [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] form of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|It's time to brief the other Jedi.|Obi-Wan Kenobi, prior to leading a mission briefing that the Givin Jedi attended|<ref name="Republic 50" />}}
A [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] with sunken [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and a white, [[Hair/Legends|hairless]] [[exoskeleton]] was a [[Jedi/Legends|member]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. During the opening [[Standard month/Legends|months]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Givin was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]],<ref name="Republic 50" /> and two months into the war,<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the Givin was one of several Jedi who were withdrawn from their commands and sent to defend the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] from the invading [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Kamino was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to over one million developing [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Army/Legends|Army]], and when intelligence uncovered by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] revealed that it was the Confederacy's next target, the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] gathered Jedi there to repulse the invaders.<ref name="Republic 50" />

In Kamino's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Tipoca City/Legends|Tipoca City]], the Givin stood with a group of fellow Jedi and listened to a pre-[[First Battle of Kamino|battle]] briefing led by Jedi Knight [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. Kenobi and Master [[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]], the latter joining the group via [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]], outlined a defensive plan that involved Jedi [[Pilot/Legends|manning]] [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class interceptors]] and [[Starfighter combat/Legends|intercepting]] incoming Confederate [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] while other Jedi remained planet-side to supervise [[Ground warfare/Legends|ground defenses]]. Confederate [[Confederacy military/Legends|forces]] attacked shortly thereafter, but the Jedi and [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] were able to repel them and ultimately force a Confederate retreat.<ref name="Republic 50" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Givin Jedi appeared in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] [[Republic 50|''Republic'' 50]], which was released by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="Republic 50" /> on [[February 26]], [[2003]].<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54498/star_wars_republic_2002_50|text=Star Wars: Republic (2002) #50}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 50|''Republic'' 50]] {{1st}}
